ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the age group (e.g., 4Years, 5Years) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height in centimeters */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist in centimeters */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" REAL /* Shoulder width in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length in centimeters */,
  "inseam_length_cm" REAL /* Inseam length in centimeters */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "neck_cm" REAL /* Neck measurement in centimeters */,
  "arm_hole_cm" REAL /* Arm hole measurement in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" REAL /* Shoulder width in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length in centimeters */,
  "inseam_length_cm" REAL /* Inseam length in centimeters */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "neck_cm" REAL /* Neck measurement in centimeters */,
  "arm_hole_cm" REAL /* Arm hole measurement in centimeters */,
  "sizing_standard" TEXT /* Sizing standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart for the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "product_color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "product_material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "product_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the product (e.g., boys, girls, unisex) */,
  "product_season" TEXT /* Season for which the product is suitable (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  "product_launch_date" TEXT /* Date the product was launched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the customer */,
  "customer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "customer_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "customer_height_cm" REAL /* Height of the customer in centimeters */,
  "customer_weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the customer in kilograms */,
  "customer_age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height in centimeters */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist in centimeters */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip in centimeters */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date the measurements were taken */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" REAL /* Shoulder width in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length in centimeters */,
  "inseam_length_cm" REAL /* Inseam length in centimeters */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "neck_cm" REAL /* Neck measurement in centimeters */,
  "arm_hole_cm" REAL /* Arm hole measurement in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "order_payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "order_shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "order_estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery for the order */,
  "order_actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery for the order */,
  "order_discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "order_tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., Ordered, Shipped, Delivered, Returned) */,
  "item_price_at_checkout" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of checkout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "return_shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the return */,
  "return_shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the return */,
  "return_reason_code" TEXT /* Code for the reason of the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "review_helpfulness" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  "review_images" TEXT /* URLs to images included in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "inventory_location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "inventory_reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the inventory */,
  "inventory_reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the inventory */,
  "inventory_last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the last reorder was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the country */,
  "sizing_standard" TEXT /* Sizing standard used in the country (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "country_flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag of the country */,
  "country_population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "region_area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
